data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of service selection and time picking without leaving the app. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or operational within the app. The linked use case specifies the need for a mini-booking interface within Instagram/Facebook, but there is no evidence demonstrating that this interface allows users to select services and pick times without leaving the app, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of service selection and time picking without leaving the app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
